description: Input schema for Seedance 1.5 Pro video generation.

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the video content and motion. Be descriptive about actions and camera movements.
examples: At breakneck speed, drones thread through intricate obstacles, delivering an immersive flying experience.
prompt.title: Prompt

image.description: Optional first-frame image for image-to-video generation. If not provided, generates from text only.
image.title: Image

resolution.description: Video resolution. 1080p for highest quality, 720p for balanced, 480p for fastest generation.

duration.description: Duration of the video in seconds (4-12 seconds).

camera_fixed.description: Whether to fix the camera position during video generation. Set to true for static camera shots.
camera_fixed.title: Camera Fixed

title: AppInput
